prompts: What are three things you're grateful for today?

What does abundance mean to you personally?
How have you grown in the past year?
What brings you the most peace?
Describe a dream or goal you have been afraid to say out loud.

Write about a time you overcame something difficult.
What are you holding onto that no longer serves you?
What would you do if you knew you could not fail?
How do you want to feel at the end of this year?

Write a letter of forgiveness to yourself.
